# Hardness Measurement

**Summary**: A measurement of the surface resistance to deformation or scratching.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-aldhafeeri|Aldhafeeri, 2023]] used hardness-measurement to evaluate the impact of acidity on the rock's surface properties.
